summary:
SPIRITUAL COVERINGS AND CHURCH MEMBERSHIP: Brandon recounts a conversation with Pastor Steve Cioccolanti regarding the concept of spiritual coverings. He explains that many individuals in the Christian community are operating independently without a designated church home or pastoral guidance. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of being integrated into a spiritual family rather than acting autonomously, noting that connecting with a church provides believers with a protective spiritual umbrella that helps them grow and receive intercessory prayer.

THE IMPACT OF LEADERSHIP ON CONGREGATIONS: Brandon highlights the direct spiritual influence that church leaders have on their staff and congregation. He illustrates this by recalling a previous experience with a church where the lead pastor was secretly committing adultery. Consequently, Brandon observed a rapid spread of similar issues, such as lust and pornography, among the staff and other leaders. He uses this example to explain the concept of a spiritual exchange and covenant, where the spiritual state of the leadership flows down to the congregation.

TITHING AND FINANCIAL COVENANTS: Brandon discusses the continued relevance of tithing in the modern era. He references the book of Malachi to support his belief that financial giving creates a covenant exchange with God and the church's pastoral covering, which in turn provides divine protection and blessings. Brandon strongly encourages believers to financially support their chosen local or online church ministries to assist pastors in spreading their message.

MINISTRY COLLABORATIONS AND PASTORAL EXAMPLES: Brandon details his ongoing relationship with Pastor Steve Cioccolanti, describing the supernatural covering he experiences when supporting his ministry. He mentions that he has been invited to lead live corporate prayer sessions on Pastor Steve's platform and expresses a desire to eventually relocate his family to attend the physical church once it is established. Additionally, Brandon praises the pastoral ministry of Pastor John Kilpatrick in Mobile, Alabama, contrasting the protective role of a pastor with his own prophetic calling.

END TIMES URGENCY AND PRAYER FOR HEALING: Brandon urges individuals to find a local church that preaches the Word of God, believes in the baptism of the Holy Spirit, speaking in tongues, and deliverance, rather than attending lukewarm or seeker-friendly congregations. He stresses the urgency of getting prepared for the return of Jesus during the last days. Brandon concludes by praying for the physical restoration of individuals suffering from specific ailments.
rawData: [March 13, 2024]-[The importance of a Church covering in the last days]-[https://youtu.be/SHUMIGqyglU]-[Hey, good morning family. I'm going to do back-to-back videos today, but I just want to tell you all another thing that was on my heart. You know, I told you all I went and had a meeting with Pastor Steve Cioccolanti, and I want to tell you all this: the Lord uses me a lot and I pray a lot with intercessory prayer. I just wanted to say this: if you're looking for... we were talking—Pastor Steve and I were just talking about covering. People don't realize... he was just talking to me and said, 'Brandon, I really think you should make a video about this, about coverings for people—prayer coverings and church coverings.' He said there's a lot of the body of Christ right now that he has seen that are rogue. They don't have a covering, they don't have a church home, they don't let anybody be their shepherd over the flock that protects them in prayer and is helping them grow spiritually. They're just out doing their own thing. I've seen bad coverings and good coverings. A lot of times, as I've told you all, when you tithe to the body of Christ—the church—there's an exchange. When you tithe there and you're giving to that church, there is an umbrella that comes over you of divine protection, favor, and a spiritual covering. I've told you all about atmospheres, and I'm very sensitive to spiritual atmospheres. You can tell when you have a good covering versus when you're in a bad covering. Pastor Steve is an amazing man of God; I'm telling you all, he loves the Lord. When I give to him, and I sow and tithe or whatever to his church, there is a supernatural covering there. Like I said, I've given to other churches, and it's like this: what's on the leadership where you're giving comes down upon the people. If the pastor is in sin, you start seeing manifestations of sin in the staff, then it starts coming down on the congregation because it starts with the head and it comes down. It's like a covenant. I haven't really gone into a lot about covenants, but some of you might know that when you go into covenant with your wife or husband and you get married, the two become one. It's like that in the spirit realm; when you link up with a church, you have a spiritual oneness. It becomes like a family; it's the body of Christ. But the body is not like the hands being rogue and the feet being rogue over here. The body becomes one; it moves and functions like a body. It's the same way when you come under a godly covering that prays for its people, intercedes, or prays for you when you're sick, or that believes in intercessory prayer like Pastor Steve. They have prayer every single night at a corporate thing, and he asked me to start being a part of that and leading some of it. I'm praying about it; I feel in my heart I'm supposed to help out with this. I encourage you, if you want to come to live prayer, you can come over to his thing. I'm going to start doing live prayer on—I believe it's like at 8:00 or something—you'll have to go to his website or his app, a really cool app, and go to the live prayer thing. He's asking me to do some of them, so I'm asking the Lord. I'm busy a lot, but I'm going to do as many as I can, at least once a week or maybe once every other week. I really feel a tugging on my heart to help. Even where I am with the Lord, I know whenever I need covering. Tithing is for today; it's just being in a family, a church. I want to encourage you: if you're rogue and off by yourself and don't feel like you need it, try a church covering that is really good, where you bring yourself under an umbrella. Some people say tithing is not for today, but I'm going to be real with you: I feel like tithing is for today. I tithe, I give, I sow, and I believe the Bible says in Malachi that he rebukes the devourer for your sake. Read that whole passage there. I still believe for me today that the windows of heaven are open and he pours out a blessing that we don't have room enough to receive. I believe with all my heart there's still a covenant exchange with finances and with the Lord and the pastor's covering. Like I was telling you all just a minute ago, when we were sowing to this other church, we didn't know the pastor was committing adultery on his wife and covering it up for a whole year. This is interesting: there is always an exchange. Everybody on staff came to me a lot for counseling, and people would say, 'Man, I am really battling with lust, pornography, and this and that.' I said, 'This is really strange because you're like the fourth person this last couple of weeks who has come up to me asking for prayer and help for this.' I started seeing it a lot in the men and the staff, and it started spreading. Then adultery started happening—a major pastor there had adultery, then another messed up with adultery, then another worker. It was starting to go through, and I wondered what was going on. But as the head, so it was coming down over the people. I'm not giving them excuses, but there was something about the spirit; there's an exchange. If you start linking yourself up with someone spiritually like this in a covenant, you have an exchange. In the old days, they talked about an exchange of something. It's the same thing with communion; it's a covenant. We take the wine which represents the blood and the cracker which represents the body, and there's an exchange. I hope I don't butcher this, but I'm trying to put it all together for you to understand the importance of having a spiritual covering over your home. Pastor Steve is an amazing covering. I'm excited to be there and be a part of his church. When he gets a physical location and it's really established, I would love to move my family there and really start to go to his church and be a part. Maybe he'll let me preach, who knows? I just want to tell you all it's important to be a part of something. Whether it's online like I'm talking about with Pastor Steve or online for someone else, don't be out by yourself. Find a good place to be a part of, tithe, give, and help the body out. Help that church out and help that pastor get his mission out and get the gospel out. Give five bucks or whatever. I feel it's important that we don't try to be a lone ranger out doing our own thing but be a part of the body. I think it's important to tell you this because I experience it firsthand. As I said, I am very sensitive to the spirit realm about this kind of stuff. I know immediately whenever there's something going on in that church. You have your spiritual antennas up and you go, 'Something's going on.' It's like Pastor John Kilpatrick; I love his ministry. If I lived in Mobile, Alabama, I'd go to his church on Sundays. I'd help Pastor Steve still, but Pastor John Kilpatrick is amazing. There are certain pastors that I really feel good about and they really stand out to me. I walk in the prophetic, but I don't walk in the pastoral. It's amazing, the gifting of a pastor and what they're called to do to help protect the sheep. I want to encourage you all to find a good church home, get plugged in somewhere, and get excited about Jesus coming. Know that we are living in the last of the last days. Let me pray for you all today. I hope this blessed you all. It was just on my heart from a conversation I had with Pastor Steve, and he thought I should talk about it because people need to hear this. They think, 'Well, Brandon doesn't need it, he's off on his own.' No, even I and my family believe this way; we believe in the local church, we believe in Jesus coming, and we believe that you need a covering. Father, I thank You for every single person represented here today. I thank You, Lord, that You would speak to their hearts. May they find a good church home if they've been hurt, grieved, or burdened down by people hurting them at a church. I thank You, Father, that they forgive them and realize that people are just people; they are human. We forgive those who persecute us or hurt us. Father, I thank You that we dust ourselves off and find a good church to go to, letting that pastor encourage us and get us filled with the Word of God. If you're going to church, find one that preaches the Word and believes in the baptism of the Holy Spirit—it's very important too. I thank You, Lord, that they would find a Holy Ghost church that believes in the baptism of the Holy Spirit, the evidence of speaking in tongues, healing, and deliverance—one that is not ashamed of the Holy Spirit or the gospel and does not preach a lukewarm, seeker-friendly gospel. We thank You, Lord, that these people would have a stirring and an urgency inside of them to get ready because Jesus is coming. We're excited about Your coming, Lord. We're excited about the signs of the times and Your coming. We thank You, Lord, for all that You're doing. We call healing, wholeness, and wellness over every single person represented here today. We call them delivered from sickness and disease from the top of their heads to the soles of their feet—delivered from acid reflux, GERD, or whatever it may be. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in divine health over thyroid disorders, eating disorders, anorexia, and all kinds of things. God has paid the price for you to be free from it, and I thank You, Lord, that You took it all on the cross for them. I thank You, Father, that You bore it in Your body so we need not bear it in our bodies. Jesus paid it for us. Father, I thank You for every person here who has liked, subscribed, and is helping me with the gospel. I call blessing on their house, family, and minds, and increase upon them in Jesus' name. They are the head and not the tail, above and not beneath; they will go through and not go under. They are more than conquerors through Him who is in Christ Jesus. We thank You, Lord, for Your covering, Your blood, and Your love for us. In Jesus' name, Amen. Well, I just want to say: please click that notification bell. I don't know where my pillows went, but it's fine; don't worry about them. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much, and we love you. We will see you very soon. Have a blessed day. Bye-bye.]
